deck.author: OpenAI Codex
deck.subject: Demonstration presentation
deck.title: Understanding Roses
deck.outline: Slide 1: Cover slide introducing roses as natural and cultural symbols with a warm, refined visual. Slide 2: Content slide explaining how roses grow and vary in form and color. Slide 3: Closing slide summarizing why roses endure in gardens and gifts.

slide-01.layoutHint: High-quality image of a classic rose bloom to set a warm, refined tone.
slide-01.mustInclude: Roses represent timeless beauty and deep cultural meaning across history.
slide-01.notes: Opening frame introducing roses as natural and cultural symbols with a warm, refined visual.
slide-01.title: Understanding Roses
slide-01.value: Audience gains an appreciation for the symbolic weight of roses before learning details.

slide-02.layoutHint: Image showing a rose bush or garden setting to illustrate growth and variety.
slide-02.mustInclude: Roses grow in diverse forms and colors adapted to different climates and seasons.
slide-02.notes: Content slide explaining how roses grow and vary in form and color.
slide-02.title: How Roses Grow and Vary
slide-02.value: Roses grow in diverse forms and colors adapted to different climates and seasons.

slide-03.intent: Roses endure because they bridge nature and emotion in gardens and gifts.
slide-03.layoutHint: Image showing a rose in a gift context or garden setting to reinforce endurance.
slide-03.mustInclude: Roses endure because they bridge nature and emotion in gardens and gifts.
slide-03.notes: Closing slide summarizing why roses endure in gardens and gifts.
slide-03.title: Why Roses Endure
slide-03.value: Audience recognizes the lasting emotional and practical value of roses.
